description:
The Divine Warriors were defeated by the Darkness and vanished far into the space-time.
In the world in chaos, a samurai ZAN realizes his mission and travels beyond the space-time to gather the scattered warriors.
In order to beat the corps of the Darkness, ZAN tries to acquire the Dark Power...

Illustrator Amano Yoshitaka announced in 2010 the worldwide release of his anime movie "DEVA ZAN" in the Spring of 2012. He intends to visualize Eastern myths with anime and to present it to the world.
Despite a projected 2012 release date, Amano stated in an October 2012 interview that the animation project was still in its development and funding stages and may instead be realised as a TV series.
